backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a leaderboard backend with functions to save scores, retrieve the top 10 sorted by move count (then time), and clear all scores.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (15-puzzle game, arcade-retro theme, custom logo) to their corresponding source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the puzzle game UI and backend integration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used by shadcn UI components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the app header with logo, a three-tab layout (Game, Leaderboard, How To Play), puzzle game wiring via usePuzzleGame, and the WinModal.
frontend/src/components/GameControls.tsx: HUD component displaying a neon-styled move counter, elapsed timer in MM:SS format, and a New Game button.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboard.tsx: Leaderboard component that fetches and displays the top 10 scores from the backend in a styled table with gold/silver/bronze rank highlights and a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/PuzzleGrid.tsx: Renders the 4x4 sliding puzzle grid with color-coded, neon-glowing tiles and handles click interactions, highlighting adjacent movable tiles and showing an empty cell placeholder.
frontend/src/components/WinModal.tsx: Displays a win dialog showing move count and elapsed time, allowing the player to submit their score via a name input or start a new game.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient and exposing status flags through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/usePuzzleGame.ts: Manages all 15-puzzle game state including tile shuffling (ensuring solvability), move counting, elapsed timer, win detection, and new game reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching top scores from the backend and submitting a new score, invalidating the scores cache on successful save.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles, CSS custom properties for a dark neon/retro theme using OKLCH colors, and utility classes for pixel fonts, neon text/border effects, and a scanlines overlay.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom fonts (pixel/mono), an extended color palette using oklch variables (including neon and dark surface colors), border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a 15-puzzle sliding game with existing features (puzzle gameplay, arcade-retro theme, custom logo) and pending backend feature requests for score storage and a top-10 leaderboard API.
